verdict: An incredibly monotonous and repetitive chart filled with awkward triple-panel jumps (hands) and severe panel bias.

issues.problem: Extreme repetition of the JUMP LR -> tap U eighth-note loop. This creates an exhausting, highly monotonous pattern that completely ignores the actual rhythm and variation of the music.
Simultaneous JUMP LR and HOLD D events require hitting three panels at once (Left, Down, Right), forcing awkward bracket stomps or 'hands' without proper progression or telegraphing.

Severe panel imbalance. Left and Right are utilized almost exclusively for jumps, while Up is used for nearly all single taps, leaving Down practically unused. This neglects natural foot-flow and rotation.
